def call(env)
      status, headers, _ = response = @app.call(env)

      unless STATUS_WITH_NO_ENTITY_BODY.key?(status.to_i)
        headers[CONTENT_TYPE] ||= @content_type
      end

      response

def type(content_type)
        return nil unless content_type && !content_type.empty?
        type = content_type.split(SPLIT_PATTERN, 2).first
        type.rstrip!
        type.downcase!
        type
      end

def secure_compare(a, b)
      a.bytesize == b.bytesize && fixed_length_secure_compare(a, b)
    end
    module_function :secure_compare
  end

def register_block_for(type, &blk)
          var_name = "@#{type}"
          blocks = instance_variable_defined?(var_name) ? instance_variable_get(var_name) : instance_variable_set(var_name, [])
          blocks << blk if blk
          blocks
        end
    end
